reference: Hi, an itchy rash on the face can be due to Razberi extract. Even though it is reported that it has no side effects, idiosyncratic reactions can occur in any individual to any product. It can be treated with Atarax twenty-five milligrams at night, Alaspan in the morning, azithromycin five hundred milligrams once daily for three days, and the application of calamine lotion can cure the condition.
